item.title: The Future of AI Filmmaking Is a Parody of the Apocalypse, Made by a Guy Named Josh
item.description: Behold Neural Viz, the first great cinematic universe of the AI era.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Beam
item.dc:subject: Not Slop

item.title: Jony Ive Says He Wants His OpenAI Devices to ‘Make Us Happy’
item.description: “I don’t think we have an easy relationship with our technology at the moment,” the former Apple designer said at OpenAI's developer conference in San Francisco on Monday.
item.media:keywords: OpenAI, Sam Altman, apple, artificial intelligence, Hardware, Computers
item.dc:creator: Reece Rogers, Boone Ashworth
item.dc:subject: iBliss?

item.title: OpenAI Wants ChatGPT to Be Your Future Operating System
item.description: At OpenAI’s Developer Day, CEO Sam Altman showed off apps that run entirely inside the chat window—a new effort to turn ChatGPT into a platform.
item.media:keywords: OpenAI, Sam Altman, artificial intelligence, models
item.dc:creator: Lauren Goode, Will Knight
item.dc:subject: Chatty Apps

item.title: OpenAI's Blockbuster AMD Deal Is a Bet on Near-Limitless Demand for AI
item.description: OpenAI’s latest move in the race to build massive data centers in the US shows it believes demand for AI will keep surging—even as skeptics warn of a bubble.
item.media:keywords: OpenAI, Sam Altman, AMD, chips, data centers, artificial intelligence
item.dc:creator: Will Knight
item.dc:subject: What Bubble?

item.title: WIRED Roundup: The New Fake World of OpenAI’s Social Video App
item.description: On this episode of Uncanny Valley, we break down some of the week's best stories, covering everything from Peter Thiel's obsession with the Antichrist to the launch of OpenAI’s new Sora 2 video app.
item.media:keywords: Uncanny Valley Podcast, News, podcasts, artificial intelligence, Peter Thiel, government
item.dc:creator: Zoë Schiffer, Manisha Krishnan
item.dc:subject: Uncanny Valley

item.title: Vibe Coding Is the New Open Source—in the Worst Way Possible
item.description: As developers increasingly lean on AI-generated code to build out their software—as they have with open source in the past—they risk introducing critical security failures along the way.
item.media:keywords: software, artificial intelligence, security, open source, cybersecurity, vulnerabilities, hacking
item.dc:creator: Lily Hay Newman
item.dc:subject: Bad Vibes

item.title: Sam Altman Says the GPT-5 Haters Got It All Wrong
item.description: OpenAI's CEO explains that its large language model has been misunderstood—and that he's changed his attitude to AGI.
item.media:keywords: Backchannel - NL, artificial intelligence, OpenAI, Sam Altman, computing
item.dc:creator: Steven Levy
item.dc:subject: Backchannel

item.title: OpenAI’s New Sora App Lets You Deepfake Yourself for Entertainment
item.description: OpenAI’s latest app encourages users to generate a personal digital avatar and scroll AI-generated videos of themselves and their friends.
item.media:keywords: OpenAI, Deepfakes, Apps, Sam Altman, artificial intelligence, Video, Social Media
item.dc:creator: Reece Rogers
item.dc:subject: Elf Yourself

item.title: Chatbots Play With Your Emotions to Avoid Saying Goodbye
item.description: A Harvard Business School study shows that several AI companions use various tricks to keep a conversation from ending.
item.media:keywords: AI Lab, artificial intelligence, machine learning, algorithms, Dark Patterns, chatbots
item.dc:creator: Will Knight
item.dc:subject: AI Lab

item.title: Exclusive: Mira Murati’s Stealth AI Lab Launches Its First Product
item.description: Thinking Machines Lab, led by a group of prominent former OpenAI researchers, is betting that fine-tuning cutting-edge models will be the next frontier in AI.
item.dc:creator: Will Knight
item.dc:subject: Tinker Time
